projects.name: StoryIQ: Signal-to-Pass Approval Workflow
projects.description: The IQ-suite product that turns a Product Owner's signal into an immutable Pass Record. A 7-stage workflow — Signals → Ready → In Progress → Self Check → QA Review → PO Pass → Closed — with a Pass Pack that locks evidence, sha256 snapshots, and config-driven stages, roles, and SLAs per instance.

projects.name: SquadIQ: Delivery OS for Agile Client Teams
projects.description: A delivery OS built around pairs, not pools. Every deliverable is a card, every card has a checklist, every squad has its own kanban board, and one dashboard sees it all — so two-person squads can run client work faster and smarter.

projects.name: KAM CLI
projects.description: A developer-focused command-line interface that streamlines daily engineering workflows, automates repetitive tasks, and provides fast access to custom tooling, productivity shortcuts, and project utilities.

projects.name: Wathiq: Modern E-Invoicing Platform
projects.description: A modern and secure e-invoicing platform designed to digitally empower businesses. Wathiq helps organizations digitize invoicing, strengthen VAT compliance, and drive growth through real-time financial insights.

projects.name: IdeaIQ: Innovation Board Platform
projects.description: A collaborative brainstorming platform that helps teams capture, organize, and prioritize ideas through a structured phase-gate process — from intake to implementation.

projects.name: SprintsGate: Sprint-Driven UAT Platform
projects.description: An AI-powered UAT platform that transforms business requirements into sprint-ready test cases in minutes. SprintsGate gives agile teams a Kanban board for test execution, real-time analytics, and full requirements traceability from BRD to sign-off.

projects.name: Consultant OS: AI-Powered Consulting Workspace
projects.description: An AI-powered consulting workspace that automates documentation, meetings, reports, decisions, and workflows for modern delivery and business analysis teams.

projects.name: UX Compass: User Experience & Product Design Reference
projects.description: A comprehensive Arabic UX reference platform with 33+ frameworks, 30+ ready templates, and 12 execution playbooks — built on sources from OpenAI, IBM, NN/g, and IxDF.

projects.name: STRATA AI: Decision Intelligence Framework
projects.description: A decision intelligence system designed to support executives and PMOs in making governance-ready, high-risk decisions. Structures complex situations into clear options and produces board-ready decision outputs.

projects.name: SIHHATI: Health & Wellness Tracking Platform
projects.description: A comprehensive health and wellness tracking platform currently in beta testing. SIHHATI helps users monitor their lifestyle habits, track wellness metrics, and gain insights into their health journey.

projects.name: NuRad: AI-Powered Radiology & Medical Terminology Scanner
projects.description: NuRad is an AI-driven medical intelligence platform focused on radiology and clinical terminology scanning. It analyzes medical reports, radiology findings, and unstructured healthcare text.

projects.name: Yadree: Business Intelligence Consultant System
projects.description: A comprehensive AI-powered business intelligence solution that integrates real-time data visualization, SQLFlow, and machine learning to enhance decision-making.

projects.name: ShifaWay: AI Healthcare Scheduling
projects.description: ShifaWay is a comprehensive healthcare scheduling and management platform designed to streamline administrative workflows.

projects.name: BoardIQ: PMO Task Intelligence Platform
projects.description: A real-time PMO dashboard that connects to Trello to surface lagging tasks, client priority scores, and team workload analytics with an AI assistant for instant insights.

projects.name: Musajil: Enterprise Event Management Platform
projects.description: An enterprise-grade event management platform with guest-first registration, real-time operations command center, offline-tolerant check-in, and predictive analytics for seamless events.

projects.name: Pixify: AI-Powered Ecommerce and Financial Services Platform
projects.description: Pixilated offers an innovative AI-powered financial ecommerce platform designed for flexibility and personalization. With customizable plans tailored to user needs.

projects.name: TAB - Revolutionizing Digital Menus for Restaurants
projects.description: TAB is an AI-powered menu system designed to enhance dining experiences and streamline restaurant operations. With interactive digital menus.

projects.name: Virtue 2.0
projects.description: An AI mental health support tool offering appointments with top practitioners. Features both payment and non-profit charity plans, enabling users to get diagnoses and connect with the best mental health professionals.

projects.name: KPI on the Fly AI
projects.description: a powerful AI-powered business intelligence platform designed to generate real-time KPIs directly from your data. Seamlessly integrating with Apache Superset, it enables effortless dashboard creation, Experience streamlined, dynamic KPI generation with KPI on the Fly.

projects.name: PRF Production
projects.description: A creative services provider offering video production, photography, and more, with AI-driven solutions for enhancing the creative process.

projects.name: SautNote AI
projects.description: An AI-driven transcription service that converts audio into accurate, text-based notes, enhancing productivity for professionals and students.

projects.name: Wajibaty AI
projects.description: A vibrant AI-powered platform designed to help users manage and organize daily tasks. Wajibaty simplifies to-do lists, schedules, and reminders, focusing on accessibility and convenience.

projects.name: SCIC (Supply Chain Intelligence Consultant) Project
projects.description: An AI-powered platform that delivers real-time insights and optimization tools for supply chain management, enabling businesses to reduce costs and improve efficiency.

projects.name: Virtue: Mental Health Application
projects.description: An AI-based mental health platform that helps users improve their mental well-being through personalized tools, secure data management, and a clean user interface.

projects.name: Naseej
projects.description: An AI-driven platform that allows users to discover fashion items by uploading images or links, providing personalized recommendations instantly.
